name: cdf
description: A risk-based development workflow Skill for AI Coding Agents. Use when invoked as cdf, $cdf, cdf:, or controlled-development-flow. Simple changes are edited directly, high-risk changes require approval, and architecture-level changes require design first.
author: webszy

install.codex: npx skills add https://github.com/webszy/my-skills --skill cdf -a codex -g -y
install.claudeCode: npx skills add https://github.com/webszy/my-skills --skill cdf -a claude-code -g -y
install.both: npx skills add https://github.com/webszy/my-skills --skill cdf -a codex -a claude-code -g -y
